summary:
The investigation of choice for diagnosing Zenker's diverticulum is upper gastrointestinal endoscopy because it provides direct visual confirmation of the diverticulum, unlike barium swallow which only shows indirect findings. Endoscopy also permits assessment of related pathologies and immediate treatment when necessary.
